productDisplayName: Biotique Women Bio Aloevera SPF 30 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Aloe vera has been called the "soothing desert lily" and used for thousands of years as a natural healer and sun protector. This nutrient-rich lotion is blended with pure aloe vera, sunflower and safflower oils to keep skin soft, fair and moisturised in the sun. It protects skin with broad spectrum SPF 30 UVA/UVB sunscreen. Skin Type- For normal to oily skinUsage- Apply liberally before sun exposure Helps reduce the risk of skin ageing, skin cancer and other harmful effects of the sun
